headline: Forget AI Hyperscalers: Tesla May Own the Most Valuable AI Application
summary: While investors fixate on Tesla's vehicle deliveries and margins, a quieter transformation is underway that positions the company to compete directly with the hyperscalers reshaping the global economy.

headline: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft
summary: In a classic “Friday news dump,” Apple filed a federal lawsuit in California against OpenAI, accusing its once-partner of stealing some of its trade secrets. Specifically, it’s alleging that two of its former employees brought proprietary and confidential information about its hardware to OpenAI when they joined. The lawsuit calls to mind Waymo’s trade secret theft lawsuit against Uber, filed in 2017. Similarly, a well-established tech giant publicly accused a fast-ascending private company, loc

headline: Palantir CEO: “Something Has Gone Completely Wrong” With OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Alex Karp called out OpenAI and Anthropic by name on live television, sent Palantir stock surging 8%, and argued that enterprises are done paying for tokens. The question is whether his numbers back up the swagger or just paper over a valuation that has Michael Burry betting against it.
